items.description: Handcrafted sushi available in Meat, Fish, or Vegan selections.

subsections.name: Events & Catering
subsections.notes: Ideal for parties, meetings, and social gatherings. Tasty platters featuring mini sandwiches, sushi, snacks, and finger foods. Menus fully customizable.

global_modifiers.name: Kit Kat Crumbs
global_modifiers.notes: Price listed as '0.30' without £ symbol in source

ambiguities: Line 503/505: Milk Tea boba add-on price listed as '+1,00' and hot modifier as '+0,20' using comma as decimal separator instead of period — interpreted as £1.00 and £0.20 respectively.
Line 547/562: Smoothie/Frappe topping add-on listed as '+0,50' with comma decimal — interpreted as £0.50.
Line 422: Kit Kat Crumbs soft-serve topping listed as '0.30' without a £ symbol, unlike all other toppings. Assumed £0.30.
Lines 459-498: Golden Toast section has a single price of £15.00 shown for the whole section but no individual prices per flavour — assumed all Golden Toast variants are £15.00.

Lines 473-498: Souffle Pancake at £12.00 lists 'Choco Banana' and 'S'more' but the layout is dense and may have more flavours not captured cleanly. American Pancake at £10.00 shows 'Original' and 'Matcha'. Crepe at £10.00 has no flavour breakdown.

Lines 599-628: Gourmet Lattes price tiers (4.50 / 5.00 / 5.50) are visually positioned near groups of items but the PDF-to-text extraction makes exact assignment ambiguous for items near tier boundaries. 'Ice-cream Espresso' appears both as an Espresso variant (£4.00) in the Coffee section and as a standalone Gourmet Latte (£4.50) — may be intentional or a duplicate.
Lines 459-498: Waffle crepe section layout is fragmented. 'Crepe' at £10.00 has no allergen codes listed separately in the raw text — allergens omitted from that item.
Line 147-162: Acai Granola Bowl layout is multi-column and garbled by PDF extraction. Items captured as a single composite description. Individual column items (bases, toppings) may be incomplete.
Lines 332-338: Sushi section has no prices listed at all — pre-order only, price presumably quoted separately.
Line 85: Sausage Roll allergen code 'S02' — this appears to be 'SO2' (sulphur dioxide) but is written as 'S02' with zero, consistent with allergen legend. Kept as 'S02' to match the legend.
Line 303: Vegan Sausages Bap has allergen 'M' (Milk) appearing visually offset at the end of the line, potentially a layout artifact — kept as listed.
Lines 600-628: 'Cream Panner' — unclear if this is a drink name or a typo (possibly 'Cream Paneer' or another item). Captured verbatim.
